en.extract:
The Arabian lark (Eremalauda eremodites) is a small passerine bird of the lark family. It is a desert bird which is found from Syria to Jordan and through Saudi Arabia to Oman.
The Arabian lark was formerly considered conspecific with Dunn's lark, but was classified as a distinct species by the Handbook of the Birds of the World Alive and by Birdlife International, and later by the International Ornithological Congress. This species is monotypic.

The '''Arabian lark''' ('''''Eremalauda eremodites''''') is a small [[passerine]] [[bird]] of the [[lark]] family. It is a [[desert]] bird which is found from [[Syria]] to [[Jordan]] and through [[Saudi Arabia]] to [[Oman]].

The Arabian lark was formerly considered [[conspecific]] with [[Dunn's lark]], but was classified as a distinct species by the [[Handbook of the Birds of the World|Handbook of the Birds of the World Alive]] and by [[Birdlife International]], and later by the International Ornithological Congress.<ref name="delHoyo2017">{{cite web|last1=del Hoyo|first1=J.|last2=Collar|first2=N.|title=Arabian Lark (''Eremalauda eremodites'')|url=http://www.hbw.com/node/1343871|website=Handbook of the Birds of the World Alive|publisher=Lynx Edicions|access-date=19 August 2017|location=Barcelona|language=en|date=2017}}</ref><ref name="BirdLifeChecklist2017">{{cite web|last1=BirdLife International|title=BirdLife International Checklist Version 9.1|url=http://www.birdlife.org/datazone/userfiles/Checklist%20v3_June10.zip|website=www.birdlife.org|access-date=19 August 2017|format=xlsx|date=2017}}</ref> This species is [[Monotypic taxon|monotypic]].<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Kirwan |first1=Guy M. |last2=del Hoyo |first2=Josep |last3=de Juana |first3=Eduardo |last4=Collar |first4=Nigel |last5=Suárez |first5=Francisco |last6=Perlman |first6=Yoav |date=2021 |title=Arabian Lark (Eremalauda eremodites), version 1.0 |url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/dunlar4/cur/introduction |journal=Birds of the World |language=en |doi=10.2173/bow.dunlar4.01 |issn=2771-3105|url-access=subscription }}</ref>
